description_long: This is a modern, stealth-inspired military jet airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The aircraft features a single-seat, forward-mounted enclosed cockpit with a bubble canopy for enhanced pilot visibility. Its wings are mid-mounted with pronounced anhedral angles and small vertical winglets at the tips, contributing to its aerodynamic efficiency and stealth profile. The tail section is equipped with twin canted vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers, forming a distinctive H-tail configuration. The engine is integrated into the rear fuselage, with a single large exhaust nozzle visible at the back. The exterior is finished in a matte gray color, typical of stealth aircraft, and the landing gear appears to be retractable, with the main gear housed under the wings and a nose gear under the forward fuselage.
description: A sleek, gray, stealth military jet with swept-back mid-mounted wings, twin canted vertical stabilizers, and a single-seat forward cockpit under a bubble canopy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, bubble canopy, and sharply swept-back wings with twin canted vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the streamlined fuselage, forward cockpit, and the single large engine exhaust at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin canted vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizers, and the central engine exhaust nozzle.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the wing and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings, pronounced anhedral angles, and small vertical winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with a large central exhaust nozzle.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin canted vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat enclosed cockpit with a bubble canopy.
